metadata.name: Pick, Pack, and Ship an Order

description: A warehouse worker needs to fulfill a customer order from start to finish.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve a pick list for a ready order.

expected_outcome.value: The worker gets a list of items and their locations.

nodes.task_description: Pick the correct items and quantities from the warehouse locations.

expected_outcome.value: The worker gathers all items for the order.

nodes.task_description: Pack the items into a box, weigh it, and generate a shipping label.

expected_outcome.value: The worker packs the order and prints a shipping label.

nodes.task_description: Update the order status to 'shipped' and provide the tracking number.

expected_outcome.value: The system is updated, and the customer is notified of the shipment.
